# Protocol Documentation Links

Use these references when evolving WebSocket contracts and JSON schemas.

## JSON Schema

- <https://json-schema.org/>
- <https://json-schema.org/specification>

## WebSocket

- <https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6455>
- <https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/WebSockets_API>

## Time And Identifiers

- <https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3339>
- <https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc4122>

## Message Design

- <https://cloud.google.com/apis/design>
- <https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/architecture/patterns/publisher-subscriber>

## Project-Specific Reference Targets

Update these files when present:

- protocol/websocket/events.md
- protocol/websocket/schemas/
- protocol/versioning.md
- protocol/examples/
